Thanks for the contribution! `structs` follows an **issue-first** workflow.

Every change must start as an issue that a maintainer approves *before* a pull request is opened.
This PR doesn't reference an approved issue yet (a linked issue carrying the `approved` label), so I've flagged it for a maintainer. This is not a judgment of your work.

To move it forward: open an issue describing the change, wait for a maintainer to add the `approved` label, then link it here with `Closes #<number>`.
See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/toaweme/structs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full flow. A maintainer may close this PR in the meantime.
